sShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/207704.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害双向提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害结果提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害结果降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"aCTbUe3dCQTrAzPr","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【前进】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草抵达霍恩公馆的时候，是在一个夜晚。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但传闻中戒备森严、如同堡垒的霍恩公馆，如今却门户洞开。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"没有守卫，没有暗哨。甚至连警备系统都处于完全关闭的状态。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"仿佛，这只是一个寻常人家的普通宅邸。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但唯一不同寻常的，是这里的所有人身上，都燎烧着各色的梦火。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她放下心来——"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅，已经自己解决了一切。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草在霍恩公馆的正厅，找到了芙蕾雅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而她正端坐在沙发上，静静地喝着红茶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"壁炉上的干柴烧出噼啪的声响，火苗映红了她那张漂亮的脸。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而她的旁边，站着一个棕发金瞳的男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「看来我来晚了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草站在旁边，她并没有要坐下的意思。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯……也不算太晚。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"放下手中的红茶，芙蕾雅看着眼前的缬草。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「请为我的客人，奉上一杯茶吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「凡尼特先生。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她转头，看向了旁边站着的男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是，尊贵的主人。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"第二天，在克拉尔克的墓园。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"墓碑前依然放着昨日的鲜花，据说，在克拉尔克死后，经常会有一些异格者来到墓园祭扫。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在离开卡佩拉之前，芙蕾雅想着最后来父亲的墓前看看。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「之后，您打算如何做？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草帮助清理掉昨日的残花之后，看着芙蕾雅亲手捧着一束白花放在了克拉尔克的墓前。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她穿得很肃穆，是她最不喜欢的黑色礼服。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我会按照与你的约定行动。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「但同样，我也会继承父亲的遗愿。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「为异格者争取权益？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不，我并不需要这样冠冕堂皇的理由，我只想为他做点什么。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅看着父亲的墓碑。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那你打算怎么做？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草看向她。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你怎么看呢？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「克拉尔克先生是一位值得尊敬的异格者，他也为所有异格者争取了不少权益……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「只不过……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草欲言又止。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「过于保守了，是吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「寄希望于他人，放弃自我的力量，博取怜悯和同情……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅接过了缬草的话，这让缬草多少有些诧异。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「您很清楚，所以不需要我的赘述。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而且，我想要提醒您，异格者之间并不存在真正的信任，异格者和人类并无二致。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「即便您有克拉尔克的政，治，遗产，但想要驾驭他们，您需要付出的代价，可并不比霍恩家族要来得低。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草继续提醒。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「那么，你就拭目以待吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【暗火】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"阿贝尔学院，是太平屿地区最知名的贵族学院，也是伊瑟最知名的十所贵族学院之一。而这，也是霍恩家族十年来最引以为傲的资产。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"自阿贝尔学院建立以来，作为昔日跻身于伊瑟十大执政家族之一的霍恩家族每年都会花费巨额资金，捐赠维系阿贝尔学院的运转。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而阿贝尔学院，也为霍恩家族培养了一批杰出的人才，成为了霍恩家族在太平屿，乃至整个伊瑟立足的政，治，资本。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"就算霍恩家族已经不再是十大执政家族之一，也依然举足轻重，拥有不俗的影响力。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"可以这么说，芙蕾雅能进入阿贝尔学院，那也就意味着得到了霍恩家族的庇护。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"父亲克拉尔克是出于想要保护自己的目的，毕竟，作为异格者权益组织保守派的领袖，时刻面临暗杀危险的他，保护自己尚且捉襟见肘，更不用说保护自己的女儿。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这一点，芙蕾雅很清楚，所以她一开始并未拒绝父亲克拉尔克，答应了霍恩家族的提议，前往阿贝尔学院就读。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不过，无论是克拉尔克，还是芙蕾雅自己，父女俩都很清楚霍恩家族并不是出于纯粹的善意，这更像是一种交易。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"克拉尔克获得霍恩家族的暗中支持，而霍恩家族，则以芙蕾雅作为控制克拉尔克的缰绳。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"只不过，他们用了非常冠冕堂皇而又充满善意、恰到好处的借口而已。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"这是那些所谓政，治，家们常用的手段。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"政，治家最为危险，但政，治家也是最好驾驭的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"——野心，是他们共同的软肋。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而那从梦中传来的声音，让芙蕾雅足以窥探到所有的真实。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一一真实的心声、赤，裸裸的野心、被遮掩的过去……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所以，当霍恩家族的次子凡尼特将这场交易赤，裸裸地摆在她面前时，她并不在意。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「所以呢，凡尼特先生。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅放下手中的茶杯，看向了眼前的凡尼特。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「您认为，我该如何？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"看着眼前那位高高在上的霍恩家族次子，芙蕾雅从他的身上嗅到了野心的味道。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那几乎要燎烧他全身的野火，正在不断地燃烧着，释放着别样的腥臭。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我们的命运，要掌握在自己的手中，不是吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特摇晃着自己的红酒杯。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你的父亲是个勇敢的人物，但可惜，在政，治，上，从来不允许存在理想主义。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「所有的理想主义者，都会在名为权，力的断头台上，滚下自己的头颅。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特露出意味深长的笑容。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我很难理解，像你这么聪明的人，为什么不劝劝你的父亲？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「非要让他在那条没有终局的道路上走下去，沦为他人的政，治，玩物。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他看向了芙蕾雅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「请继续。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅并未在意凡尼特的嘲弄，哪怕那是针对自己的父亲。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我很想听听您的建议。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她的语气一如既往地柔和。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「和我合作吧，芙蕾雅。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我需要你的能力，而只有你的能力能够帮助我。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「如果你能帮助我扳倒丹克里德，让我成为霍恩家族的家主，我会保护你，也一样会保护你的父亲。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而你，也将不再是束缚你父亲的缰绳。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你父亲的宏愿，我会竭尽全力帮助他实现。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特将红酒一饮而尽，然后将红酒杯放在了桌上，那双金色的瞳孔，正死死地盯着眼前的芙蕾雅。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【抉择】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"卡佩拉地区的霍恩公馆，可以说是霍恩家族最核心的区域了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在第一继承人丹克里德被揭发曾与R.C.S.相互勾结之后，为保证政，治，前途，霍恩家族果断大义灭亲，将作为继承人的丹克里德送往了E.O.S.安全警备署。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而凡尼特，也如愿以偿，成为了霍恩家族的第一继承人。这一切，都是因为他选中了芙蕾雅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"论狠毒，他的确比丹克里德更具手段，更符合那群操弄权，力之徒的期望。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"通过煽动《观察区法案》的通过，凡尼特暗中进一步激化了异格者与人类之间的矛盾，让异格者中的那些激进派，像是发了疯一样在各处引起骚乱。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虽然克拉尔克的努力都付诸东流，但对于E.O.S.而言，尤其是对于最高理事会而言，克拉尔克的政，治，价值，却随着那些激进派煽动暴乱而水涨船高。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而霍恩家族也因此得到了许多异格者的支持，中间派的绝对领袖。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"如同凡尼特所说，她的父亲克拉尔克，彻底成为了政，治，的玩物。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但她也很清楚，除了这些，现在的克拉尔克，对于凡尼特而言还有另一个作用。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"成为束缚自己的缰绳。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特，比她想象得要更聪明。不光监视着她的一切，还给她套上了一条无法摆脱的缰绳。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但很可惜，霍恩家族的其他人并不是这么认为的，起码在克拉尔克的事情上，凡尼特再聪明，也没能阻止他的家族。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"即便凡尼特已经严令保护克拉尔克，但霍恩家族的其他人，还是偷偷放任黄金边界的杀手潜入了霍恩公馆。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"最终杀手在浴缸里刺死了克拉尔克，他们希望用克拉尔克的生命，为他们的心中的野火添上最后一捧干柴。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅从他们的梦中窥视到了一切，但她没办法阻止这一切。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"霍恩家族对克拉尔克的葬礼极其用心，而且超出了预期中的规格。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"来吊唁的人很多，大多都是克拉尔克的支持者，还有很多慕名而来的异格者。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他们都得到了霍恩家族高规格的接见。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你父亲的死，是一个意外。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特向她解释，在她父亲的葬礼之中，在克拉尔克的墓碑之前。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我知道。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅的声音一如既往地柔和，没有任何自己的情绪，仿佛不像是在自己父亲的葬礼中。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特看向芙蕾雅，心中却奇怪地生出一种不安。前所未有的不安，那种感觉像是坠入了水中，拼命地想要抓住些什么。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「凶手已经查到了，来自黄金边界。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特说着自己的调查结果，但更像是在做着某种解释。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"像是在极力撇清楚霍恩家族的关系。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他甚至也不清楚，为什么自己想要拼命和芙蕾雅解释什么，明明她只是自己笼子里的一只金丝雀。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅淡淡地回应，从未表露出任何异样的情绪。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"肃穆的葬礼，却有很多人窃窃私语。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那些克拉尔克的追随者们，希望芙蕾雅能够继承父亲的遗志，成为新的领袖。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但芙蕾雅始终只有沉默。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特帮助她打发了所有人，以「刚失去至亲的父亲，需要安静」为由，拒绝了后续大多数异格者的拜访。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但他们无一例外，都被引向了霍恩家族的会客室。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"终于，在一个深夜，凡尼特坐在了芙蕾雅所居住的塔楼客厅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"不是以霍恩家族现任家主的身份，而是以一个朋友的身份。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"起码他自己是这么说的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他也表现出了自己仅有的诚意一一支走了在这座塔楼里暗中监视芙蕾雅的两名异格者。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然后，他一如既往地端着红酒杯，背靠在柔软的沙发上。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但那双金色的瞳孔，一刻也没有从芙蕾雅的身上离开过。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我说的这些，你应该也都明白。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一杯下肚，凡尼特将酒杯放在了桌上，然后他又给自己倒了一杯。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅依然喝着红茶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她很清楚，凡尼特会站在这里，证明那些异格者也不全是愚昧之徒。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"政客的嘴脸，在克拉尔克死去，在《观察区法案》突然公布的那一刻，他们看得很清楚。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「和我父亲一样，把那些异格者团结起来，和霍恩家族继续合作。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「然后，从容赴死，对吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅笑着看向了眼前的男人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我不会让你死的。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而且我说过，你父亲的死只是个意外。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你会成为比克拉尔克更出色的领袖。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"相比起过往的自负，现在的凡尼特，更具家主的威严。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「对于现在的霍恩家族来说，你的价值不可估量。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「会成为你们重返十大执政家族必要的阶梯，对吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我并不否认。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特并没有否认芙蕾雅的话。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你已经卷进来了，芙蕾雅。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你和我都明白，政，治的漩涡，只要卷进来了，就再也出不去了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「除非，你能掌控它。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「做出选择吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特喝下最后一杯酒，放下酒杯，看向了芙蕾雅。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「以你构想的方式？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅反问着他。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「没错，我会改变这一切。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「用我的方式。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特很确定，他甚至从未怀疑过自己的道路。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「优柔寡断的E.O.S.，用民，主和自由来粉饰自己的一切，欺骗了异格者，也同样欺骗了自己。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「解决一切麻烦的方式，那就是绝对的控制和力量。集中所有的权，力和力量，清除一切的反对者，这才是唯一的路径。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「怀柔，只会让自己死得更惨。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「就像是在肚子里生长的寄生虫，姑息，只会一点一点让宿主肠穿肚烂。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「而想要取得自己的利益，就得成为这绝对权，力和绝对力量的一部分。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特的想法很简单，改变权，力，分散的局面，用绝对的手段，来切除这个世界、当前制度的病灶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但是，他忘记了一个点···如果病灶是权，力本身呢?"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"得意、傲慢、自负……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"她甚至看见了，凡尼特亲手为霍恩家族掘出的墓穴。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"客厅的老式座钟响了起来，已经是午夜时分。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伴随着十二声钟响的最后一声落下。凡尼特站了起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅依然选择了沉默，她并没有打算答应凡尼特。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"但同样，为了自己的安全，她并不想就这样和凡尼特翻脸。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「就像是当初让你答应帮助我扳倒丹克里德一样。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「我会给你足够的时间考虑。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过……可不要让我等太久。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凡尼特转身，离开了这间塔楼。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"数日后……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"因为芙蕾雅突然陷入沉睡，凡尼特用了很多种办法试图唤醒她，但都无济于事……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"而此时，在梦域的隙间……"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那是一片梦域的黑海，是一片无尽的混沌之地。是数据的夹缝当中，是一片原本不该出现的地方。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在黑海的中，央，那近乎无尽的回廊之上，赤身的芙蕾雅，从最上层的梦池中缓缓苏醒。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一直站在旁边等候的缬草，紧皱的眉头也终于舒展开来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一她，那个叫芙蕾雅的少女，成功了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那一场豪赌，她赌赢了。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「恭喜你。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草看着眼前的少女。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「恭喜您成为了这片黑海的主人，芙蕾雅小姐。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「您符合我家主人的期待。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"缬草右手扣胸，朝着芙蕾雅鞠躬。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"赤身的芙蕾雅从梦池中走了出来，而在回廊的上空，一头白龙、一头黑龙正在来回盘桓着。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「谢谢你的守护，缬草女士。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「也替我感谢特里西娅，哦不，我应该称呼她为Admin。 」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"芙蕾雅饶有深意地看着旁边的缬草。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「接下来，就请你陪我去一个地方吧。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「去什么地方？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「卡佩拉地区、霍恩公馆，我会在那里等你。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「是！听候您的差遣。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"……"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.7f96ffbe5d35a8","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拉条、推条、净化、增益、减益、治疗"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"集成度非常高的辅助角色，副本覆盖率极高，爬塔和源网都有非常高的使用率。pvp还有2种玩法，一种纯辅助高速，一种纯输出启示录打速攻"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.642bb8a669b688","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8戍卫+6讯光天击"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6316ddcb623938","isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"胡狼"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_551/h_445/50364/842288/2025/7/18/879378.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"UqzVl9xO4KbOWAuF","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"sbZnxr2mc7BxVatW","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
